facts: NIT Goa (National Institute of Technology Goa) is located at Cuncolim, Goa 403703.
Languages spoken locally: Konkani; everyone speaks Hindi outside campus, some English. Languages spoken on campus: Major Telugu, Hindi + English.
Climate: Summer (hot).
Dabolim/Vasco da Gama Airport is near NIT Goa.
Madgaon Railway Station is near NIT Goa.
Swiggy delivery is available at NIT Goa.
NIT Goa has 2 hostels: Talpona (boys) and Terekol (girls).
All years are combined in one hostel (boys and girls separately).
1st year students get 2 per room (double sharing).
From 2nd year onwards, students get single rooms.
Mess at NIT Goa is run by Kuber Health Food.
Full 7-day detailed menu with breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner available (Monday to Sunday with specific items).

fee_structure.notes: Fee structure PDF is image-based (12 pages). Specific fee numbers could not be extracted from the image-based PDF. This is a data gap.

facts: WiFi is available at NIT Goa with both 2.4G and 5G bands.
NIT Goa requires 75% attendance in all subjects.
Savyaas: Main fest of NIT Goa.
Prasang: Fest at NIT Goa.
3 washing machines per floor in NIT Goa hostels.
Laundry costs Rs 40 per wash at NIT Goa.
NIT Goa does not have student elections.
Football and Cricket are played on the same shared ground at NIT Goa.
1 Basketball court, 1 Volleyball court, and 1 Badminton court available at NIT Goa.
2 canteens on NIT Goa campus, open till 11 PM.
Coming after 9 PM: Rs 5,000 fine at NIT Goa.
Caught drinking: Rs 20,000 fine at NIT Goa.
Caught smoking: Rs 10,000 fine at NIT Goa.
Property damage: Rs 5,000+ fine at NIT Goa.
No gym available on NIT Goa campus.
Shushruta Clinic is available on NIT Goa campus.
The clinic is free for students and operates 24/7.

nearby: Restaurants near Cuncolim market, approximately 1 km from campus

facts: Local language: Konkani. Everyone speaks Hindi outside campus, some English.
Campus languages: Major Telugu, Hindi + English.
Summer (hot) climate at NIT Goa.
